meaning: n.使灯光忽明忽灭的装置,发出闪光之物
examples: Would be great to get some very good and reliable flasher.
E3 flasher is a special device to help you programme NAND and NOR flash data.
All the important switches in the passenger compartment-except for the hazard flasher switch-are soft-touch components that have a similar feel to using a touchscreen.
